output.name: repository_structure_analysis_ai_process_inventory
output.purpose: The AI process inventory analysis for the repository, including AI tools used, prompt patterns, and process integration.

input.name: repository_structure_analysis_code
input.purpose: Code structure analysis covering tech stack, modules, build tooling, and quality gates.
input.use_instruction: Reference the repository_structure_analysis_code to understand the repository's tech stack, module boundaries, and build system. Use to validate snippet tech-stack signals and for cross-reference synthesis.

input.name: repository_structure_analysis_conceptual_docs
input.purpose: Conceptual documentation inventory covering README, field guides, glossaries, user manuals, and API docs.
input.use_instruction: Reference the repository_structure_analysis_conceptual_docs to understand the repository's documentation coverage. Use has_field_guide, has_user_manual, has_glossary flags to guide AI-generated doc evidence detection and for cross-reference synthesis.
